decks.notes: The deck focuses on generating value through recurring creatures and artifacts to set up a powerful board state that can overwhelm the opponent. It uses Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II as key pieces to generate tokens and control the board, while also disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Thoughtseize. The deck also utilizes cards like Cache Grab and Witherbloom Command to draw cards and maintain resources. Overall, the deck aims to create a strong presence on the battlefield through a combination of creature tokens and powerful artifacts.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Arboreal Grazer and Lotus Field, enabling powerful combos with cards like Scapeshift and Emrakul, the Promised End. It also utilizes lands like Boseiju, Who Endures and Port of Karfell to protect key spells. Lumra, Bellow of the Woods and The Wandering Minstrel provide card advantage and tempo control, while Ishkanah, Grafwidow offers a defensive option. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a quick and explosive win condition, backed up by versatile and resilient cards.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the Greasefang Parhelion combo to quickly overwhelm opponents with a strong board presence. The deck includes cards that support this strategy such as Fatal Push for removal, Monument to Endurance for protection, and Thoughtseize for disruption. By setting up the combo and protecting key pieces with various spells and lands, the deck aims to create a powerful and difficult to counter win condition.

The main goal of this deck is to quickly assemble Lotus Field and generate a large amount of mana to cast powerful spells and win the game. This is achieved by using cards like Scapeshift and Lumra, Bellow of the Woods to search for and play Lotus Field while also utilizing cards like Crumbling Vestige and Arboreal Grazer to ramp up mana production. The deck also includes cards like Thassa's Oracle and Culling Ritual as win conditions once the combo is assembled, making it a fast and efficient combo deck in a Pioneer 1 vs 1 format.

This deck focuses on combining Greasefang, Okiba Boss with Parhelion II to create a powerful board presence and overwhelm the opponent. It utilizes various cards like Bitter Triumph, Cache Grab, and Thoughtseize to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck also includes Esika's Chariot, Formidable Speaker, and Raffine's Informant for additional support and card advantage. By efficiently using its combo pieces and key cards, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent to secure victory in the Pioneer 1 vs 1 format.

The deck revolves around assembling the Greasefang Parhelion combo pieces, using cards like Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II to generate powerful synergies. This combo is supported by other cards like Esika's Chariot and Overlord of the Balemurk to ensure the combo's success. The deck also includes various control elements like Thoughtseize and Witherbloom Command to disrupt opponents' strategies and protect the combo pieces. Additionally, the deck features powerful threats like Skysovereign, Consul Flagship and Starting Town to apply pressure on opponents and secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of counter spells, card draw, and removal to disrupt the opponent's strategy while generating card advantage and maintaining board presence. The deck includes a mix of instant and sorcery spells, as well as efficient creatures to pressure the opponent. The key strategy is to outvalue the opponent by efficiently controlling the game with a mix of interaction and threats to secure victory.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through counterspells, removal spells, and board wipes while using the companion Kaheera to provide additional value. The deck also includes powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Elspeth, Storm Slayer to help maintain board presence and generate card advantage. The main win condition is to out-value the opponent through card advantage and efficient removal, eventually overwhelming them with powerful threats like The Wandering Emperor. The deck aims to control the game from start to finish, denying the opponent any opportunity to gain an advantage.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive creatures and burn spells. By utilizing cards like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage, along with efficient burn spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The addition of cards like Den of the Bugbear and Ramunap Ruins provide additional damage sources to help close out the game. Overall, this deck is designed to apply constant pressure and quickly defeat the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize.

This deck focuses on creating a powerful combo with Greasefang Parhelion II by utilizing cards like Formidable Speaker, Esika's Chariot, and Overlord of the Balemurk to generate value and overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Bitter Triumph to control the game and protect the combo pieces. The combination of strong creatures, vehicles, and support spells allows the deck to quickly assemble its combo and overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board presence.

This UW Control deck focuses on maintaining board control and disrupting the opponent's game plan through counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. The inclusion of Kaheera as a companion provides additional flexibility and synergy with the deck's creatures. The deck aims to control the tempo of the game, protect its own threats, and ultimately outvalue the opponent with powerful late-game cards like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria. With a mix of card advantage, removal, and a solid mana base, this deck is designed to outlast and outmaneuver its opponents in a 1 vs 1 setting.

The main concept of this Aggro - Arclight Phoenix deck is to quickly fill your graveyard with instant and sorcery spells to bring back Arclight Phoenix from the graveyard. Use cards like Consider, Sleight of Hand, and Opt to help dig for spells, while also using cards like Fiery Impulse and Lightning Axe for removal. Take advantage of Treasure Cruise to refuel your hand and keep up the pressure with quick aggressive creatures like Cori-Steel Cutter and Picklock Prankster. Use Otawara, Soaring City and Riverpyre Verge to fix your mana base and ensure you have the right colors for your spells.

The deck focuses on utilizing the combo between Greasefang and Parhelion II to generate a powerful board presence and overwhelm the opponent. It includes support cards like Esika's Chariot, Thoughtseize, and Witherbloom Command to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The key strategy is to assemble the combo pieces while maintaining control of the game until the combo can be set up for a game-winning play. Additionally, cards like Collective Brutality and Overlord of the Balemurk help to further enhance the combo's effectiveness and secure victory.

This deck focuses on assembling a powerful combination of cards centered around Greasefang Parhelion, using a mix of control elements like thoughseize and fatal push along with creatures like iron-shield elf and fleeting spirit to protect and enable the combo. The main goal is to set up a strong board presence while disrupting the opponent's strategy, ultimately leading to a game-winning play with Parhelion II. The deck also includes utility lands like Geier Reach Sanitarium and Monument to Endurance to further support the combo strategy.

This Orzhov Control deck focuses on disruption and removal to control the board and outvalue opponents. By utilizing cards like Duress and Thoughtseize to strip opponents' hands, along with removal spells like Fatal Push and Vanishing Verse, the deck aims to dismantle opponent's strategies. Key creatures like Gifted Aetherborn and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse provide additional pressure and value. The deck also utilizes land disruption with Urborg, Tomb of Yawgmoth and Mutavault to further control the game. With a mix of hand disruption, removal, and powerful creatures, this deck aims to dominate the battlefield.

This deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with fast and aggressive plays, utilizing creatures with haste and burn spells to deal damage quickly. The key strategy is to maintain pressure on the opponent while efficiently removing any threats they may have. The deck aims to control the board and finish off the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize. The inclusion of land cards that provide extra damage and flexibility adds to the deck's overall power and reach.
